name: joplin-plugin-time-tracker
description: Time tracking plugin with frontmatter support for writing projects.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npx webpack --mode=production && mkdir -p dist/ui && cp src/manifest.json dist/ && cp src/ui/panel.css dist/ui/ && cp src/ui/panel.js dist/ui/ && echo Build done
scripts.dist: npm run build && mkdir -p publish && rm -f publish/*.jpl && cd dist && V=$(node -e "console.log(require('../package.json').version)") && tar -cf ../publish/io.arena.timetracker_v${V}.jpl * && cd .. && cp src/manifest.json publish/ && echo "JPL: publish/io.arena.timetracker_v${V}.jpl"

author: Arena.ai Agent Mode
